articles.title: US 🇺🇸 Treasury sanctions individuals and companies linked to the illicit shipping and sanctions evasion network of Iranian 🇮🇷 oil shipping magnate Mohammad Hossein Shamkhani. Sanctions targets include Iranian🇮🇷, Dominican 🇩🇲, Russian 🇷🇺, Danish 🇩🇰, Italian 🇮🇹, Indian 🇮🇳, and British 🇬🇧 citizens, and companies based in the British Virgin Islands 🇻🇬, UAE 🇦🇪, Marshall Islands 🇲🇭, Hong Kong 🇭🇰, St Kitts & Nevis 🇰🇳, Singapore 🇸🇬, India 🇮🇳, and Iran 🇮🇷. 20 vessels were also identified as blocked property.

Treasury expands sanctions against 𝐌𝐨𝐡𝐚𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐝 𝐇𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐢𝐧 𝐒𝐡𝐚𝐦𝐤𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐢'𝐬 illicit shipping empire, designating over 50 individuals, entities, and vessels involved in Iranian oil exports, containerized shipping, and sanctions evasion following Iran's renewed attacks in the Strait of Hormuz. 𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐅𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐨𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬: • 𝐇𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐢𝐧 𝐆𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐛𝐚𝐧𝐢 𝐙𝐚𝐡𝐞𝐝 (Iranian/Dominica) - Primary financier providing exchange house services and foreign currency access; beneficial owner of Golden Nest Group Ltd (BVI/Dubai) and director of BSG Management Ltd (Dubai) • 𝐌𝐨𝐡𝐚𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐝 𝐑𝐞𝐳𝐚 𝐑𝐚𝐡𝐛𝐚𝐫 𝐌𝐚𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐢 (Iranian/Dominica) - Key financier for network operations and shell company access; owns Iran-flagged vessel ERIKA • 𝐀𝐥𝐢 𝐑𝐚𝐤𝐡𝐛𝐚𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐢 (Iranian/Russian) - Head of shipping operations, linked to multiple sanctioned companies including Koban Shipping, Crios Shipping, and Marvise SMC DMCC; owner of Al Kina Commercial Broker LLC • 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐧 𝐀𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧 𝐊𝐚𝐚𝐥𝐮𝐧𝐝 (Danish) - Former global CFO of sanctioned House of Shipping Investment FZCO; co-founder of Evorit Strategy Consulting LLC-FZ • 𝐀𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐚 𝐑𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐨 (Italian) - Former global CEO of House of Shipping; co-founder of Evorit Strategy Consulting LLC-FZ • 𝐀𝐬𝐠𝐡𝐚𝐫 𝐀𝐠𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐢 𝐃𝐞𝐡𝐤𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐢 (Iranian) - Strategic role across multiple network companies including Milavous Group Ltd 𝐎𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐏𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐥: • 𝐉𝐢𝐣𝐢𝐧 𝐆𝐞𝐨𝐫𝐠𝐞 (Indian) - Employee of sanctioned Teodor Shipping L.L.C., facilitates vessel operations • 𝐆𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐚𝐦 𝐕𝐢𝐬𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐝𝐞𝐞𝐩 (Indian) - Manager facilitating Iranian oil shipments and network coordination • 𝐁𝐞𝐡𝐳𝐚𝐝 𝐌𝐨𝐠𝐡𝐚𝐝𝐚𝐬 (Iranian) - Vessel operations facilitator • 𝐌𝐚𝐤𝐬𝐢𝐦 𝐓𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐨𝐬𝐣𝐨𝐯 (British) - Senior vessel inspector for illicit shipping network 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐝 𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐩𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐍𝐞𝐭𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤: • 𝐒𝐞𝐚 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐝 𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐩𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐏𝐓𝐄. 𝐋𝐭𝐝. (Singapore) - Core containerized shipping firm with subsidiaries in Dubai, Marshall Islands, and India; manages vessels carrying goods to Iran-backed Houthis in Yemen • 𝐖𝐞 𝐅𝐫𝐞𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐒𝐡𝐢𝐩𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐋𝐋𝐂 (Dubai) - Yahya Rahim Safavi, senior military advisor to Iran's 🇮🇷 Supreme Leader: -Ayatollah Khamenei instructed him in 2011 to prepare a plan to close the Strait of Hormuz -Safavi worked with then-IRGC commanders Ali Fadavi, Amir Ali Hajizadeh, and Hossein Salami to draft a plan covering military operations in the Persian Gulf, the Sea of Oman, the Red Sea, and the Mediterranean -In 1997, when Safavi became IRGC commander, Khamenei placed particular importance on expanding Iran's missile arsenal. At teh time, Iran posessed ~2,000 missiles; Khamenei reportedly instructed military commanders to build and stockpile a missile arsenal capable of sustaining "at least three months of an offensive war."

RT by @lookner: Statement No. (72) The official spokesman for the Ministry of Defense, Colonel Saud Abdulaziz Al-Atwan, stated that the Armed Forces have detected, from this evening until now, (1) ballistic missile, (5) cruise missile, and (33) enemy drones, and they were intercepted and dealt with. The sinful Iranian aggression resulted in the targeting of a number of vital and civilian installations, and the fall of shrapnel in a number of locations in the country, leading to material damage. A naval vessel belonging to the Kuwaiti Naval Force was also targeted, and as a result, a number of (4) members of the armed forces were injured. They received the necessary medical care and treatment, and their condition is stable. The Armed Forces confirm that they will continue to perform their tasks and duties efficiently, within the framework of continuous preparedness and preparedness, in a way that enhances the security of the nation and preserves the safety of citizens and residents. #Kuwaiti_Army
